card.name: Lucia Showcase
card.text: Lifelink, stylish Deeper Than Blood — Whenever another creature you control dies during your turn, [if you sacrificed it,] you may pay 3 life. If you do, return it from the graveyard to the battlefield with a finality counter on it. Partner—Devil Hunter

card.name: Order Basilisk
card.text: Bestow {1}{G}{G} (If you cast this card for its bestow cost, it's an Aura spell with enchant creature. It becomes a creature again if it's not attached.) Enchanted creature gets +2/+2. When this creature or enchanted creature attacks, it gains trample and each other attacking creature you control gets +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Order Gladius
Bianco Angelo
card.text: Bestow {2}{W}{W} (If you cast this card for its bestow cost, it's an Aura spell with enchant creature. It becomes a creature again if it's not attached.) First strike Enchanted creature gets +3/+3 and has first strike.

card.name: Fortuna Terrace
card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control a Plains. {T}: Add {W}. {1}{W}, {T}: If your rank is A or higher, create a 1/1 green and white Citizen creature token. {2}, {T}: Gain a rank.

card.name: Mallet Castle
card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control a Swamp. {T}: Add {B}. {1}{B}, {T}: If your rank is A or higher, target creature gains lifelink until end of turn. {2}, {T}: Gain a rank.

card.name: Vie de Marli
card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control a Mountain. {T}: Add {R}. {R}, {T}: If your rank is A or higher, exile the top card of your library. Until end of turn, you may play that card. {2}, {T}: Gain a rank.

card.name: Red Grave Ruin
card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control a Forest. {T}: Add {G}. {G}, {T}: If your rank is A or higher, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. {2}, {T}: Gain a rank.

card.name: Temen-ni-Gru Apex
card.text: This land enters tapped unless you control an Island. {T}: Add {U}. {1}{U}, {T}: If your rank is A or higher, scry 2. {2}, {T}: Gain a rank.

card.name: Ascension Ceremony
card.text: When this enchantment enters, put a shield counter on target creature. Whenever a shield counter is removed from a creature you control, it becomes a Demon in addition to its other types, then it connives. (Draw a card, then discard a card. If you discarded a nonland card, put a +1/+1 counter on that creature.)

card.name: Alto Angelo
card.text: Bestow {2}{W}{W}{W} Vigilance Enchanted creature gets +4/+4 and has vigilance. {1}{W}, {T}: Alto Angelo deals X damage to target attacking or blocking creature, where X is the number of modified creatures you control. (Equipment, Auras you control, and counters are modifications.)

card.name: The Holy Knights of Sparda
card.text: When this enchantment enters, put a shield counter on target creature. (If it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a shield counter from it instead.) Whenever a shield counter is removed from a creature you control, create a 2/2 white Knight creature token with vigilance.

card.name: Order Cutlass
Lusachia
card.text: Each spell you cast that's a Demon, Horror, or Nightmare costs {1} less to cast. Whenever you cast a spell, if the amount of mana spent to cast it was less than its mana value, target opponent loses life equal to the difference.

card.name: Devil Sword Yamato
Gerbera GP01
Stolen Arm
card.text: Imprint — When this artifact enters, exile target creature card from a graveyard. Equipped creature gains +1/+1 and has all of the exiled card's activated and triggered abilities. (Anything that has a cost or uses the words "when," "whenever," or "at.") {1}, Sacrifice this artifact: Equipped creature becomes a copy of the exiled card and gets +3/+3 until end of turn. Equip {2}

card.name: Rawhide
Nico's Workshop
card.text: Trample When this Vehicle enters or attacks, you may destroy target artifact, enchantment, or Wall. If a permanent is destroyed this way, its controller draws a card. Crew 1

card.name: Ragtime
Hell Antenora
card.text: Persist (When this creature dies, if it had no -1/-1 counters on it, return it to the battlefield under its owner's control with a -1/-1 counter on it.) Enrage — Whenever this creature is dealt damage, it deals damage equal to its power to target creature an opponent controls.

card.name: Demonochorus
card.text: Flying Whenever this creature enters or leaves the battlefield, put a +1/+1 counter on another target creature.

card.name: Matier, Protector
card.text: Soulbond (You may pair this creature with another unpaired creature when either enters. They remain paired for as long as you control both of them.) As long as Matier is paired with a legendary creature, both of them have "{T}, Sacrifice this creature: Creatures you control gain indestructible until end of turn."

card.name: Secretary Demons
card.text: When this creature enters or dies, destroy target creature.

card.name: Trismagia
card.text: Flying, myriad (Whenever this creature attacks, for each opponent other than defending player, you may create a token that's a copy of this creature that's tapped and attacking that player or a planeswalker they control. Exile the tokens at end of combat.) Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, draw a card.

card.name: Familiar: Griffon
card.text: Flying Whenever Griffon attacks, you and target opponent each mill three cards. That opponent loses life equal to the number of lands among those cards. Escape—{1}{B}, exile two other cards from your graveyard. (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its escape cost.)

card.name: Familiar: Shadow
card.text: Trample Whenever Shadow attacks, put a +1/+1 counter on him, then mill cards equal to his power. Escape—{1}{G}, exile two other cards from your graveyard. (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its escape cost.)

card.name: Gold Orb
The Bloody Palace
card.text: ({T}: Add {B} or {R}.) This land enters tapped unless your rank is a A or higher.

card.name: Dante's Awakening
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature loses hexproof, shroud, protection, and ward. () Spells and abilities that target enchanted creature cost {2} less to cast or activate. {U}: Exile Lock On, then return it to the battlefield. (An Aura entering the battlefield without being cast will attach to a valid target, but without actually targeting it.)

card.name: The Legendary Knight Returns
card.text: When The Legendary Knight Returns enters the battlefield, gain a Stylish Rank. (Your rank starts at D. If it's A or higher, ignore the text in brackets.)

card.name: A Poison Tree
card.text: Menace Scavenge {3}{G}{G} ({3}{G}{G}, Exile this card from your graveyard: Put a number of +1/+1 counters equal to this card's power on target creature. Scavenge only as a sorcery.) When you scavenge Mega Scarecrow, put a menace counter on the targeted creature.

card.name: Awakened Lineage
card.text: Flash Enchant green or white creature you control "Power!" — Enchanted creature gets +2/+2 and has reach and vigilance. "Give me more power!" — When this Aura enters, enchanted creature gains hexproof and indestructible until end of turn. Return up to one Aura card from a graveyard to the battlefield attached to that creature.

card.name: Sin Devil Trigger
card.text: Flash Enchant red or white creature you control Shift — When this Aura enters, enchanted creature gains hexproof and indestructible until end of turn. At the end of your next combat phase, untap each creature you control and there is an additional combat phase after it. Sin Stinger — Enchanted creature gets +2/+2 and has flying, haste, and double strike.

card.name: Electrified Devil
card.text: Flash Enchant black or red creature you control Collider — When this Aura enters, enchanted creature gains hexproof and indestructible until end of turn. That creature deals 1 damage to target player and each creature they control. Inazuma — Enchanted creature gets +2/+2 and has menace and haste.

card.name: Lightning Ride
card.text: Haste, trample Dynamic Entry — Whenever this artifact becomes a creature, it gets +X/+0 until end of turn, where X is the total power of creatures that crewed it this turn. Crew 1

card.name: Mitis Rainforest
card.text: ({T}: Add {G} or {U}.) This land enters tapped unless your rank is a A or higher.

card.name: Chamber of Mystery
card.text: ({T}: Add {U} or {R}.) This land enters tapped unless your rank is a A or higher.

card.name: Decaying Gardens
card.text: ({T}: Add {B} or {G}.) This land enters tapped unless your rank is a A or higher.

card.name: Dumary Alleyways
card.text: ({T}: Add {R} or {W}.) This land enters tapped unless your rank is a A or higher.

card.name: Sparda Estate
card.text: ({T}: Add {W} or {B}.) This land enters tapped unless your rank is a A or higher.

card.name: Knight SSS
card.text: Vigilance

card.name: Blood SSS
card.text: {1}, {T}, discard a card, sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.

card.name: Third Hell: Wrath SSS
card.text: When this creature dies, it deals 1 damage to any target.

card.name: Treasure SSS
card.text: {T}, sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Citizen SSS
card.text: (This creature is probably enchanted by a copy of the Aura it partially overlaps.)

card.name: I Want Yours, Too
card.text: {1}: Exile up to two target cards from graveyards. If either was put there this turn, you may play it, and mana of any type may be spent to cast it.

card.name: Illuminated Corruption Artemis
card.text: Flying, vigilance Captive Core — When Artemis enters, exile target creature or artifact you don't control until Artemis leaves the battlefield. Devil Arm — When Artemis dies, exile it. While it's exiled, you may cast its other face. --- (Back): Devil Arm: Artemis

card.name: Devil Arm: Artemis
card.text: Sphere — Equipped creature gets +2/+0 and gains vigilance. Acid Rain — When equipped creature deals combat damage to a player, destroy up to one target artifact or enchantment that player controls. Equip {2} --- (Front): Illuminated Corruption Artemis

card.name: Frost Toad Bael
card.text: Creatures you control have ward {1}. Creatures can't be assigned to attack you unless their controller pays {1} for each of those creatures. Devil Arm — When this creature dies, exile it. While it's exiled, you may cast its other face. --- (Back): PF594: Argument

card.name: PF594: Argument
card.text: Flying, prowess, prowess Tokens can't crew this Vehicle. At the beginning of your combat, if Argument is a creature, create a number of colorless 3/1 Missile artifact creature tokens with haste, trample, and decayed equal to its power. Crew 3 --- (Front): Frost Toad Bael

card.name: Incandescent Colossus Goliath
card.text: Trample Melt Slag — Whenever a nontoken artifact is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, put a +1/+1 counter on Goliath. Devouring Vortex — Whenever Goliath deals combat damage to a player, you may destroy target artifact or enchantment that player controls.

card.name: Frost Demon
card.text: Crystallize — If you would put one or more counters on one or more other nonsnow creatures you control, you may put one of each of those kinds of counters on this creature as well.

card.name: Fury Demon
card.text: Flash, haste This creature has hexproof and first strike if it entered this turn.

card.name: Sin Scissors
card.text: Flying This creature enters with two shield counters.

card.name: Blade of Mundus
card.text: Whenever this creature enters or attacks, you may sacrifice another permanent. If you do, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature and draw a card.

card.name: Blitz
card.text: Blitz {3}{R} (If you cast this spell for its blitz cost, it gains haste and "When this creature dies, draw a card". Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.) When this creature leaves the battlefield, it deals 2 damage equal to its power to any target.

card.name: Let's Light This Candle
card.text: Discard your hand, add {R}{R} for each card discarded this way, then draw two cards. Exile this card. Plot {4}{U}{U} (You may pay {4}{U}{U} and exile this card from your hand. Freecast it as a sorcery on a later turn. Plot only as a sorcery.)

card.name: You Have Failed Me
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature. Exile the top X cards of your library, where X is twice the sacrificed creature's power. You may play those cards this turn. If you cast a spell this way, pay life equal to its mana value rather than paying its mana cost.

card.name: Kalina Ann
card.text: Multiple — Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, equipped creature deals 2 damage to any target and you create a colorless 3/1 Missile artifact creature token with haste and decayed. (It can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.) Equip {2}

card.name: Demon Emperor's Edict
card.text: Stylish (Your rank starts at D.) Choose one. If your rank is A or higher, choose one or more instead. • Each opponent sacrifices a nontoken creature. • Each opponent sacrifices a creature token. • Each opponent sacrifices an enchantment.

card.name: Hell Judecca
card.text: Menace Underworld Gate — Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, return target creature card with mana value less than that damage from a graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Proto Angelo
card.text: Whenever a creature you control deals combat damage to a player, that player mills a card. Whenever this creature attacks, creatures you control that are attacking a player with seven or more cards in their graveyard get +1/+0 until end of turn.

card.name: Round Trip
card.text: Destroy target creature an opponent controls. That player loses 3 life. Exile Round Trip suspended with three time counters on it. Suspend 3—{1}{B} (Rather than cast this card from your hand, you may pay {1}{B} and exile it with three time counters on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter. When the last is removed, you may freecast it.)

card.name: Kat, Urban Witch
card.text: Each artifact, enchantment, Demon, and Devil card in your hand has cycling {2}. ({2}, discard that card: Draw a card.) {3}, Sacrifice an artifact, enchantment, Demon, or Devil: Draw a card.

card.name: Fraternal Ferocity
card.text: This spell costs {3} less to cast if it targets a creature you control. Two target creatures owned by different players fight. (Each deals damage equal to its power to the other.)

card.name: Nelo Angelo
card.text: Duelist — Whenever a creature you control attacks a player, if no other creature is attacking that player, put a +1/+1 counter on it and it can't be blocked by nonlegendary creatures until end of turn.

card.name: Damned Knight
card.text: While this creature is attacking, creatures you control with even mana values can't be blocked by creatures with even mana values, and creatures you control with odd mana values can't be blocked by creatures with odd mana values.

card.name: Damned Queen
card.text: Menace, lifelink Queen's Gambit—Whenever a nontoken, nonland permanent you control is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, each opponent sacrifices a permanent that shares a type with it. For each opponent who can't, Damned Queen deals 3 damage to that player.

card.name: I'M NOT LETTING YOU DIE!
card.text: Until end of turn, players can't sacrifice permanents and creatures can't die or be exiled.

card.name: Isolated Phone
card.text: When this artifact enters, mill three cards. When you do, return up to one target artifact or creature card from your graveyard to your hand. Whenever one or more artifact or creature cards leave your graveyard, put a +1/+1 counter on up to that many creatures.

card.name: Judgment Cut
card.text: Target creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn. Judgment Cut End — Overload {2}{B}{B} (You may cast this spell for its overload cost. If you do, change "target" in its text to "each.") Replicate {B} (When you cast this spell, copy it for each time you paid its replicate cost. You may choose new targets for the copies, if it had targets.)

card.name: Red Orb Crystal
card.text: Defender When this creature enters or leaves the battlefield, create a tapped Treasure token.

card.name: Steel Impact Gilgamesh
card.text: Trample, vigilance, reach This spell costs {X} less to cast, where X is the greatest power among creatures you control.

card.name: Helter Skelter
Lesser Fallen
card.text: Flying, lifelink {W}: Launch this creature. (Exile it. While it's exiled, its owner may cast it by paying {2} instead of its mana cost.)

card.name: Devilish Laboratory
card.text: When this artifact enters, move a counter from any number of target creatures onto this artifact and exile up to five cards from graveyards.. When this artifact is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, draw a card for each counter on it, then put all of those counters on target creature.

card.name: Overture
Sweet Surrender
Agonofinis
card.text: Lifelink {2}{B}, Sacrifice a creature: Return this card from your graveyard to the battlefield. Put X +1/+1 counters on it, where X is the sacrificed creature's mana value.

card.name: Settle the Argument
card.text: Stylish (Your rank starts at D. If it's A or higher, ignore the text in brackets.) Counter target spell [unless its controller pays {2}]. If a spell is countered this way, exile it instead of putting it into its owner's graveyard.

card.name: Jump Cancel
card.text: Counter target artifact, enchantment, or sorcery spell. Its controller gains 4 ranks.

card.name: Devil Bringer
card.text: Enchant creature When this Aura enters, draw a card. Absorb Power — Whenever this or another enchantment enters the battlefield under your control, put a +1/+1 counter on enchanted creature.

card.name: Vergil Showcase
card.text: Haste, stylish Blistering Swords — Whenever you attack, [if Vergil is attacking,] each player mills a card. For each land card in target defending player's graveyard, create a tapped and attacking 1/1 blue Illusion creature token. Exile it at the end of combat. Partner—Devil Hunter

card.name: Dante Showcase
card.text: Haste, stylish Whenever Dante attacks, choose one. If your rank is A or higher, you may choose one or more. Taunt — Goad target creature. Stinger — Dante gets +1/+0 and gains first strike this turn. High Time — Launch target nonlegendary creature. Partner—Devil Hunter

card.name: Nico Showcase
card.text: Haste, stylish "Behold my genius!" — {T}, sacrifice an artifact: Return another target artifact card [with equal or lesser mana value] from your graveyard to your hand. Put a +1/+1 counter on a number of creatures up to the difference in their mana values. Partner—Devil Hunter

card.name: V Showcase
card.text: Haste, stylish The Book — {T}: Mill three cards. Promotion — {T}: If your rank is A or higher, cast a creature card from your graveyard as though it had delve. Partner—Devil Hunter

card.name: Nero Showcase
card.text: Haste, reach, stylish Devil Breaker - Whenever Nero attacks, you may freecast an Equipment spell or spell that targets only him [if its mana value is less than his power]. If it was a permanent spell, when it enters, attach it to Nero, and at the beginning of your next end step you draw a card and sacrifice that permanent. Partner—Devil Hunter

card.name: Kyrie Showcase
card.text: Stylish Hymn to Sparda — Whenever a non-Citizen creature you control becomes the only target of a spell or ability, you may pay {GW}. If you do, create a 1/1 green and white Citizen creature token. When you do, copy that spell or ability. The copy targets that token. [You may do this only once each turn.] Partner—Devil Hunter

card.name: Trish Showcase
card.text: Haste, stylish Electrical Dance — {1}{BR}. {Q}, pay 3 life: Choose three targets. If your rank is A or higher, you may choose up to two additional targets. Trish deals X damage divided evenly between them, rounded down, where X is equal to the highest amount of life lost by a player this turn. Partner—Devil Hunter

card.name: Brontomancer
card.text: Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature deals 1 damage to each opponent. If you casting a noncreature spell causes a triggered ability of a permanent you control to trigger, and you didn't cast it from your hand, that ability triggers an additional time.

card.name: Devil Sword Dante
card.text: Swords Formation — Equipped creature has double strike, menace, and "Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control." Equip {4}. This ability costs {3} less to activate if the creature it targets was dealt damage this turn.

card.name: Credo Showcase
card.text: Ward {2}, vigilance, stylish Guard Captain — Whenever you attack, put a shield counter on target creature. If your rank is A or higher, untap it and put a +1/+1 and a vigilance counter on it as well. At the beginning of the next end step, remove a shield counter from that creature. Partner—Devil Hunter

card.name: Sinister Devil Trigger
card.text: Flash Enchant blue or black creature you control Hell on Earth — When this Aura enters, enchanted creature gains hexproof and indestructible until end of turn. Each opponent sacrifices a creature. Deep Stinger — Enchanted creature gets +2/+2 and has flying and first strike.

card.name: True Power
card.text: Flash Enchant red or green creature you control "This ends. Right here." — When this Aura enters, enchanted creature gains hexproof and indestructible until end of turn. It deals damage equal to its power to up to two target creatures. If either one would die this turn, return it to its owner's hand instead. "Do you have a problem with that?" — Enchanted creature gets +2/+2 and has trample and haste.

card.name: Angelo Credo
card.text: Flash Enchant white or blue creature you control Aegis Shield — When this Aura enters, enchanted creature gains hexproof and indestructible until end of turn. Prevent all damage that would be dealt to you or permanents you control this turn. Swipe of Sword — Enchanted creature gets +2/+2 and has flying and vigilance.

card.name: Wings of the Guardian
card.text: Flash Enchant white or black creature you control Chrono Heart — When this Aura enters, enchanted creature gains hexproof and indestructible until end of turn. Launch up to one other target nonland permanent. (Exile it. While it's exiled, its owner may cast it by paying {2} instead of its mana cost.) Enchanted creature gets +2/+2 and has flying and lifelink.

card.name: Vice President Baines
card.text: Flying Elite Forces — Whenever another creature you control enters, Baines gets +1/+0 until end of turn. Born-Again — Whenever Baines attacks, exile up to one target creature you own, then return it to the battlefield under your control tapped and attacking.

card.name: Double Up
card.text: Until end of turn, whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, exile that spell instead of putting it into your graveyard as it resolves. If you do, it becomes plotted. (You may freecast it as a sorcery on a later turn.) Exile Double Up.

card.name: Get More Orbs
card.text: Whenever you cast a spell from anywhere other than your hand, create a tapped Treasure token.

card.name: Charge Shot
card.text: Each instant and sorcery card in your hand has suspend X. Its suspend cost is equal to its mana cost reduced by {X}. X can't be 0. Cards suspended this way get "When you remove the last time counter from this card and don't cast it, it becomes plotted." (Pay the suspend cost, then exile it suspended with X time counters. Remove a counter at the beginning of your upkeep. When the last is removed, you may freecast it then, or on a later turn as a sorcery.)

card.name: Stand And Fight Together
card.text: Convoke (Your creatures can help cast this spell. Each creature you tap while casting this spell pays for {1} or one mana of that creature's color.) Put X +1/+1 counters on target creature, then put a +1/+1 counter on each creature that convoked this spell. (If this spell is copied, the same creatures convoked the copy.)

card.name: My Flesh Fails Me
card.text: Cumulative upkeep—Mill a card. (At the beginning of your upkeep, put an age counter on this permanent, then sacrifice it unless you pay its upkeep cost for each age counter on it.)

card.name: Season of Loss
card.text: Choose up to five ★ worth of modes. You may choose the same mode more than once. ★ — Each player sacrifices a creature of their choice. ★★ — Draw a card for each creature that died under your control this turn. ★★★ — Each opponent loses X life, where X is the number of creature cards in your graveyard.

card.name: The Savior
card.text: Flying, vigilance, lifelink Whenever The Savior enters or attacks, you may exile target nonland card in your graveyard with mana value four or less. If you do, copy it, and you may freecast the copy. (A copy of a permanent spell becomes a token.) Creature tokens you control have vigilance and lifelink.

card.name: Yamato Reconstruction
card.text: Whenever another artifact leaves the battlefield, you may have Yamato Reconstruction become a copy of that artifact, except it has this ability, its name is still Yamato Reconstruction, and it's still legendary.

card.name: Is Sanity The Price To Pay...
card.text: Target opponent mills five cards. Draw cards equal to the number of land cards in that player's graveyard.

card.name: Infestant
card.text: When this creature enters, gain control of target artifact. For as long as you control this creature, you control that artifact, it's an artifact creature, and it has a base power and toughness equal to its mana value if it didn't already have one. Whenever this creature attacks, you may attach any number of target Equipment to it.

card.name: Red Queen
Blue Rose
Nefasturris
card.text: This land enters tapped. Reach, vigilance {T}: Add {B}. Sacrifice another permanent: Put a +1/+1 counter on this land. It becomes a black Demon Construct creature that's still a land until end of turn. Activate only once each turn.

card.name: Table Hopper
card.text: Overcommit — Whenever a creature deals damage to you, goad it until the end of its controller's next turn. Reposition — Sacrifice this enchantment during the declare blockers step: Choose an attacking creature. For any number of creatures the defending player controls, that creature either blocks it or stops blocking it. (The new blocks don't have to be legal. If you remove all blockers from a blocked creature, it's still "blocked.")

card.name: Infested Chopper
card.text: Flying, lifelink, persist (When this permanent is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, if it had no -1/-1 counters on it, return it to the battlefield under its owner's control with a -1/-1 counter on it.)

card.name: Order of the Sword HQ
card.text: This land enters with a shield counter on it. (If it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a shield counter from it instead.) {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Move a shield counter from this land onto target creature. Activate only if two or more creatures entered the battlefield under your control this turn.

card.name: Heaped Harvest
card.text: When this artifact enters and when you sacrifice it, you may search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: You gain 3 life.

card.name: Fortuna Castle
card.text: ({T}: Add {W} or {U}) This land enters tapped unless your rank is a A or higher.

card.name: Ferrum Hills
card.text: ({T}: Add {R} or {G}.) This land enters tapped unless your rank is a A or higher.

card.name: Evil Waterways
card.text: ({T}: Add {U} or {B}.) This land enters tapped unless your rank is a A or higher.

card.name: Field of Brotherhood
card.text: ({T}: Add {G} or {W}.) This land enters tapped unless your rank is a A or higher.

card.name: Heroic Intervention
card.text: Permanents you control gain hexproof and indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: Patty Lowell
card.text: Commanders you control have ward {2}. {T}: Add {W}{W}. Spend this mana only to cast Aura and/or Equipment spells. {T}: Attach target Aura or Equipment you control to target creature you control. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Dante, Unwitting Scion
card.text: Vigilance, trample Other modified creatures you control have vigilance and trample. (Equipment, Auras you control, and counters are modifications.) Quantum Amulet — When Dante enters, return target Aura or Equipment card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Demon Emperor Mundus
card.text: Flying, trample, lifelink Whenever Mundus enters or attacks, destroy another target creature. Whenever a creature an opponent controls dies, you may create a token that's a copy of it. Do this only one time each turn.

card.name: Demonic Traitor Arkham
Urizen
card.text: Trample, reach, ward {2} Bloody Roots — Whenever a land card is put into a graveyard from anywhere, create a tapped Blood token. Whenever Urizen enters or attacks, mill five cards. You may put any number of land cards and up to one creature card milled this way onto the battlefield. Whenever you sacrifice a Blood, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.

card.name: Beryl, Beastheads Hunter
card.text: Deathtouch AT Rifle — Whenever Beryl deals combat damage to a player, you may sacrifice another nonland permanent. If you do, draw two cards and each opponent loses life equal to the mana value of the sacrificed permanent.

card.name: Phineas, Underworld Prophet
card.text: Whenever a player attacks with three or more creatures, draw a card.

card.name: Mary, DARKCOM Operative
card.text: Vengeful Hatred — Whenever Mary attacks, each opponent loses X life, where X is the number of other attacking creatures. Prioritize the Mission — {2}, Sacrifice another creature: You gain 2 life and draw a card.

card.name: Gloria, Mysterious Benefactor
card.text: When Gloria enters, look at the top four cards of your library. You may reveal an artifact card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the unrevealed cards on the bottom of your library in a random order and create a tapped Powerstone token. (It's an artifact with "{T}: Add {C}. This mana can't be spent to cast a nonartifact spell.")

card.name: Freki and Geri
card.text: Twin Hounds — Whenever a player casts a spell that targets only Freki and Geri, you may copy that spell. (It has the same target. Copies of Aura spells enter as tokens.)

card.name: Green Empusas
card.text: Flying Bloody Roots — Whenever a land card is put into a graveyard from anywhere, create a tapped Blood token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.") Bloods you control have "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery."

card.name: Vile Succubus
card.text: Vigilance, trample, defender Soporific Slime — Whenever a permanent you control enters, each player mills a card. Process Runoff — {1}{G}: Shuffle three target cards from target player's graveyard into their library. Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature and it loses defender until end of turn.

card.name: Puia
card.text: Flash Squad {U} (As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may pay {U} any number of times. When this creature enters, create that many tokens that are copies of it.) Flying

card.name: Puia Token SSS
card.text: Flying (This token's cost is {U}.)

card.name: Vergil, Liberator of Makai
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, you may move a counter from target creature you control onto a second target creature you control. Whenever one or more creatures you control with counters on them deal combat damage to a player, you may draw a card and proliferate. Do this only once each turn. (To proliferate, choose any number of permanents and/or players, then give each another counter of each kind already there.)

card.name: Kyrie, Voice of Hope
card.text: Stylish (Your rank starts at D. If it's A or higher, ignore the text in brackets.) Hymn to Sparda — Whenever a non-Citizen creature you control becomes the only target of a spell or ability, you may pay {GW}. If you do, create a 1/1 green and white Citizen creature token. When you do, copy that spell or ability. The copy targets that token. [You may do this only once each turn.] Partner—Devil Hunter

card.name: Royal Fork
card.text: Destroy any number of target creatures that were dealt damage this turn. Draw a card.

card.name: White Rabbit, Revolutionary
card.text: Demons you control have menace, lifelink, and haste. Cross Over — At the beginning of combat on your turn, exile up to one target creature card from a graveyard. If you exiled a card this way, create a token that's a copy of that card, except it's a 5/5 black Demon.

card.name: Neo-Generator
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. This mana can't be spent to cast a nonartifact spell. (Abilities aren't spells.) When this artifact is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, lose 1 life and create a tapped Powerstone token. (It's an artifact with "{T}: Add {C}. This mana can't be spent to cast a nonartifact spell.")

card.name: Ambitious Scum Sid
card.text: Stylish (Your rank starts at D. If it's A or higher, ignore the text in brackets.) Whenever a creature you control leaves the battlefield, you may return it to the battlefield under target opponent's control. Goad it for the rest of the game. Whenever a goaded creature deals combat damage to an opponent, draw a card and put a +1/+1 counter on Sid. [This ability triggers only once each turn.]

card.name: Face Your Nightmares
card.text: Target player mills ten cards. Then, exile any number of cards from that player's graveyard. For each creature card exiled this way, create a token that's a copy of it, except it's a 1/1 Illusion.

card.name: Sparda's Challenger Baul
card.text: Menace When Baul enters, mill three cards. Then put X +1/+1 counters on him, where X is twice the number of creature cards in your graveyard.

card.name: Furiataurus
card.text: As long as this creature has a counter on it, it gets +1/+1. As long as it's equipped, it gets +2/+2 and has trample. As long as it's enchanted, it gets +2/+2 and has menace.

card.name: Chained Behemoth
card.text: Trample This creature enters with a shield counter on it. Whenever a shield counter is removed from a creature you control, it deals damage equal to its power to another target creature.

card.name: Ghost Rage
card.text: At the beginning of combat, choose a color. This creature gains protection from the chosen color until end of turn. (It can't be blocked, targeted, damaged, enchanted, or equipped by anything of that color.)

card.name: Barbed Chaos
card.text: Menace Grind Wheel — Whenever this creature attacks, it gets +1/+1 until end of turn and defending player mills a card. If it was a nonland card, repeat this process (until they mill a land).

card.name: Orangguerra
card.text: Reach Other creatures you control get +1/+1.

card.name: Shatter the Rebellion
card.text: Stylish (Your rank starts at D.) Choose one. If your rank is A or higher, choose one or more instead. • Destroy target artifact. • Destroy target enchantment. • Exile up to five target cards from graveyards.

card.name: Body of the Savior
card.text: Stylish (Your rank starts at D.) Choose one. If your rank is A or higher, choose one or more instead. • Destroy target enchantment. • Destroy target creature with toughness 4 or greater. • Launch target nonland permanent. (Exile it. While it's exiled, its owner may cast it by paying {2} instead of its mana cost.)

card.name: Petal Ray
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, pay {X} or sacrifice an attached Equipment. For each of up to X targets, choose a different number from 1 to X. Petal Ray deals that much damage to that permanent or player.

card.name: Unworthy Opponent
card.text: Kicker {2} (You may pay an additional {2} as you cast this spell.) If this spell was kicked, creatures target opponent controls get -X/-0 until end of turn, where X is the number of land cards in that player's graveyard. Return all creatures with power 1 or less to their owner's hands.

card.name: You Listen, Dead Weight.
card.text: Return each nonland permanent that's not historic to its owner's hand. (Artifacts, legendaries, and Sagas are historic.)

card.name: Dreamrunner
card.text: First strike Escape—{B}. (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its escape cost.) If this creature would be put into a graveyard from the battlefield, instead shuffle it into its owner's library, then mill three cards.

card.name: Scudo Angelo
card.text: Vigilance Whenever this creature enters or attacks, mill two cards. If they didn't share a card type, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

card.name: Charisma
card.text: Whenever enchanted creature deals damage to a creature, gain control of the other creature for as long as this Aura remains on the battlefield.

card.name: Damned Rook
card.text: Castle — {G}: Change a target of target spell or ability to this creature.

card.name: Hound Master Bolverk
card.text: Whenever a creature you control becomes the only target of a spell, put a +1/+1 counter on it. If an opponent controlled that spell, you may draw a card.

card.name: Powerstone SSS
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. This mana can't be spent to cast a nonartifact spell. (Abilities aren't spells.)

card.name: Power Of The Yamato
card.text: Choose two target creature cards in your graveyard. Sacrifice a creature. If you do, return the chosen cards to the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Devil's Dalliance Lilith
card.text: Ward {1} Creatures can't be assigned to attack you or to block creatures you control unless their controller pays {1} for each of those creatures.

card.name: Dante's Office
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {2}, {T}: Gain a rank. {3}, {T}: If your rank is A or higher, draw a card.

card.name: Rancor
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +2/+0 and has trample. When Rancor is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, return it to its owner's hand.

card.name: DMC Ride Armor
card.text: Living weapon (When this Equipment enters, create a 0/0 black Phyrexian Germ creature token, then attach this to it.) Indestructible Equipped creature gets +5/+5 and has first strike, trample, indestructible, haste, and "Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a creature, exile that creature." Equip {7}

card.name: Tomboy
Manipulator of Malice Jester
card.text: Jester enters with three shield counters. Whenever a shield counter is removed from a creature you control, tap and goad target creature, then Jester connives. (Draw a card, then discard a card. If you discarded a nonland card, put a +1/+1 counter on that creature.)

card.name: Soprano Angelo
card.text: Enchant creature When this Aura enters, draw a card. {0}: Untap enchanted creature. Activate only during your turn and only once each turn. Tap enchanted creature: Untap target artifact, creature, or land. Activate only if enchanted creature is multicolored and only once each turn.

card.name: Colosseum Sacrifice Griffon
card.text: Flying Flock Off — Whenever a creature you control deals combat damage to a player, you may sacrifice it. If you do, draw that many cards.

card.name: V, The Mysterious One
card.text: Haste, stylish (Your rank starts at D.) The Book — {T}: Mill three cards. Promotion—{T}: If your rank is A or higher, cast a creature card from your graveyard as though it had delve. (Each other card you exile from your graveyard while casting it pays for {1}.) Partner—Devil Hunter

card.name: Would-Be King Arius
card.text: When Arius enters, you become the monarch. The Four Arcana — Whenever you attack, if you're the monarch, you may put a Demon or Devil creature card from your hand onto the battlefield tapped and attacking. At the beginning of the next end step, sacrifice it.

card.name: Nightmare: Omega
card.text: Flash Haste, trample, stylish (Your rank starts at D. If it's A or higher, ignore the text in brackets.) At the beginning of your end step, sacrifice Nightmare. Illegal Move—You may [not] cast Nightmare from exile.

card.name: Lucia, Forlorn Protector
card.text: Lifelink, stylish (Your rank starts at D. If it's A or higher, ignore the text in brackets.) Deeper Than Blood — Whenever another creature you control dies during your turn, [if you sacrificed it,] you may pay 3 life. If you do, return it from the graveyard to the battlefield with a finality counter on it. Partner—Devil Hunter

card.name: Agni and Rudra
card.text: Trample, stylish Equipped creature gets +3/+3 and has trample. Whenever this creature or equipped creature deals combat damage to a player for the first time each turn, if your rank is A or higher, untap it and give it double strike until end of turn. There's an additional combat phase after this phase. Reconfigure {R}{W} ({R}{W}: Attach to target creature you control; or unattach from a creature. Reconfigure only as a sorcery. While attached, this isn't a creature.)

card.name: Order Alchemist Agnus
card.text: Stylish (Your rank starts at D. If it's A or higher, ignore the text in brackets.) Arsenal Demons — At the beginning of combat on your turn, put X +1/+1 counters on up to one target noncreature artifact, where X is Agnus's power. It becomes a 0/0 Demon creature in addition to its other types (permanently). Science Will Never Die — Whenever an artifact creature you control dies, if its power was greater than its base power, draw a card. [This ability triggers only once each turn.]

card.name: Nico, Artisan of Arms
card.text: Haste, stylish "Behold my genius!" — {T}, sacrifice an artifact: Return another target artifact card [with equal or lesser mana value] from your graveyard to your hand. Put a +1/+1 counter on a number of creatures up to the difference in their mana values. Partner—Devil Hunter

card.name: Nero, Upstart Hunter
card.text: Haste, reach, stylish (Your rank starts at D. If it's A or higher, ignore the text in brackets.) Devil Breaker — Whenever Nero attacks, you may freecast an Equipment spell or spell that targets only him [if its mana value is less than his power]. If it was a permanent spell, when it enters, attach it to Nero, and at the beginning of your next end step you draw two cards and sacrifice that permanent. Partner—Devil Hunter

card.name: Monstrous Mother Echidna
card.text: Haste, stylish (Your rank starts at D.) Chimera Assault — Whenever Echidna attacks, create a 1/1 green Demon Plant creature token with "{1}, exile this creature: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. It gains trample until end of turn." If your rank is A or higher, create two instead. Devil Arm — When Echidna dies, exile her. While she's exiled, you may cast her other face. --- (Back): Devil Arm: Gilgamesh

card.name: Devil Arm: Gilgamesh
card.text: Equipped creature gets +1/+1 and has trample. Distorted Real Impact — {R}{G}: Equipped creature gets +X/+0 until end of turn, where X is the difference between its power and its base power. Equip {1} --- (Front): Monstrous Mother Echidna

card.name: Trish, Fiendish Femme Fatale
card.text: Haste, stylish (Your rank starts at D.) Electrical Dance — {1}{BR}. {Q}, pay 3 life: Choose three targets. If your rank is A or higher, you may choose up to two additional targets. Trish deals X damage divided evenly between them, rounded down, where X is equal to the highest amount of life lost by a player this turn. Partner—Devil Hunter

card.name: Dante, Hot-Headed
card.text: Menace, stylish (Your rank starts at D.) "Let's get violent!" — Whenever one or more creatures are dealt noncombat damage by a source you control, if at least one of those creatures doesn't have lethal damage on it, you may exile the top card of your library. Until the end of your next turn, you may play that card. Kablooey — Whenever Dante attacks, if your rank is A or higher, he deals 2 damage to any target.

card.name: Vergil, Alpha and Omega
card.text: Haste, stylish (Your rank starts at D. If it's A or higher, ignore the text in brackets.) Blistering Swords — Whenever you attack, [if Vergil is attacking,] each player mills a card. For each land card in target defending player's graveyard, create a tapped and attacking 1/1 blue Illusion creature token. Exile it at the end of combat. Partner—Devil Hunter

card.name: Tycoon of Limbo Mundus
card.text: Menace, stylish (Your rank starts at D.) Indebt — Whenever a land card enters a graveyard from anywhere, create a Treasure token. Invest — Whenever a player sacrifices a Treasure, if your rank is A or higher, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control.

card.name: Vergil, Cold-Hearted
card.text: Stylish The Order — Whenever Vergil attacks, he connives. (Draw a card, then discard a card. If you discarded a nonland card, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.) Clear to Rule — Whenever you put one or more counters on one or more creatures [with no counters on them], you may pay {1}. If you do, draw a card.

card.name: You Might Never Return
card.text: Stylish (Your rank starts at D.) Flip a coin. Exile target nonland permanent you control. For each opponent, exile up to one target nonland permanent they control. If your rank is A or higher, return the permanent you controlled to the battlefield.

card.name: Wake Up To Justice
Dark Realm Command
card.text: Dark Realm Command enters tapped unless you control a legendary creature. {T}: Add {W}. {1}{W}, {T}: Draw a card. Activate only if you attacked with two or more creatures this turn.

card.name: Righteous Rampage
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +10/+10 and has trample and annihilator 2. (Whenever that creature attacks, defending player sacrifices two permanents.)

card.name: Credo, Holy Knight
card.text: Ward {2}, vigilance, stylish (Your rank starts at D.) Guard Captain — Whenever you attack, put a shield counter on target creature. If your rank is A or higher, untap it and put a +1/+1 and a vigilance counter on it as well. At the beginning of the next end step, remove a shield counter from that creature. Partner—Devil Hunter

card.name: Mundus's Spawn
card.text: Emerge {7}{B}{B} (You may cast this spell by sacrificing a creature and paying the emerge cost reduced by that creature's mana value.) Trample, menace Whenever this creature enters or attacks, each opponent sacrifices a creature. For each opponent who can't, draw a card.

card.name: Sefirot Puppeteer Hosanna
card.text: Stylish (Your rank starts at D.) Whenever you attack, populate. The token enters tapped and attacking. (To populate, create a token that's a copy of a creature token you control.) Whenever you create a copy of a creature token, if it had counters on it and/or Auras attached to it and your rank is A or higher, the copy enters with the same counters and copies of the same Auras.

card.name: World of V
card.text: Stylish (Your rank starts at D.) Each player reveals cards from the top of their library until they reveal a land card, then puts those cards into their graveyard. If your rank is A or higher, each opponent loses life equal to the number of cards they revealed this way and you gain life equal to the total number of cards (everyone) revealed this way.

card.name: Parasitic Fiend Nidhogg
card.text: Bloody Roots — Whenever a land card is put into a graveyard from anywhere, create a tapped Blood token. "Chaaaarge!" — Bloods you control have "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Create two 1/1 green Plant Tentacle creature tokens with haste and decayed." (It can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.)

card.name: The Qliphoth Awakens
card.text: Bloody Roots — Whenever a land card is put into a graveyard from anywhere, create a tapped Blood token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.") While you control five or more Bloods, creatures you control get +3/+3

card.name: Empusa Queen
card.text: Bloody Roots — Whenever a land card is put into a graveyard from anywhere, create a tapped 1/1 green Insect creature token and a tapped Blood token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.") Frenzied Blood — Bloods you control have "{2}, {T}, sacrifice this token: Creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn."

card.name: Malformed Witch Malphas
card.text: Bloody Roots — Whenever a land card is put into a graveyard from anywhere, create a tapped Blood token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.") Foul Ritual — Bloods you control have "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card."

card.name: I Need More Power
card.text: Each player mills three cards. Put any number of land cards milled this way onto the battlefield under your control.

card.name: Expel From Memory
card.text: Destroy all creatures, then any number of target players each mill half their library, rounded down.

card.name: Plant Tentacle SSS
card.text: Haste, decayed (This can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.)

card.name: Bring Friends
card.text: Enchant creature As long as enchanted creature is green, it gets +1/+1 and has trample. As long as enchanted creature is white, it gets +1/+1 and has indestructible. As long as enchanted creature has a base power of 1, whenever it deals combat damage to a player, create that many 1/1 green and white Citizen creature tokens.

card.name: Devil Sword Sparda
Divinity Statue
card.text: Noncreature, nonland cards in your hand have plot. The plot cost is equal to the mana cost. (You may pay the plot cost and exile it from your hand. Freecast it as a sorcery on a later turn. Plot only as a sorcery.) Whenever you cast a noncreature spell from anywhere other than your hand, draw a card.

card.name: Lady Showcase
card.text: Reach, stylish Double Barrels — Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, you may exile a noncreature, nonland card with equal or lesser mana value from your hand. [You may do this only once each turn.] The exiled card becomes plotted. Partner—Devil Hunter

card.name: The Demon's Legacy
card.text: Choose a creature you control. If {W}{W} was spent to cast this spell, destroy each creature with greater power than it. If {B}{B} was spent to cast this spell, destroy each creature with lesser power than it.

card.name: Buster Arm
Pasta Breaker
Devil Sword Alastor
Quicksilver Style
card.text: (Cast this spell only if you control a legendary creature or planeswalker.) Stylish (Your rank starts at D. If it's A or higher, ignore the text in brackets.) The owner of target nonland permanent chooses to put it [into their hand,] on the top of their library, or on the bottom of their library. Partner—Devil Hunter (This can be your second commander if the other is a creature with this ability.)

card.name: Engineer Style
card.text: (Cast this spell only if you control a legendary creature or planeswalker.) Stylish (Your rank starts at D. If it's A or higher, ignore the text in brackets.) Draw three cards. [Then discard two cards.] Partner—Devil Hunter (This can be your second commander if the other is a creature with this ability.)

card.name: Trickster Style
card.text: (Cast this spell only if you control a legendary creature or planeswalker.) Stylish Launch target nonland permanent [you control]. (Exile it. While it's exiled, its owner may cast it for {2} instead of its mana cost.) Partner—Devil Hunter (This can be your second commander if the other is a creature with this ability.)

card.name: Royalguard Style
card.text: (Cast this spell only if you control a legendary creature or planeswalker.) Stylish (Your rank starts at D. If it's A or higher, ignore the text in brackets.) Nonland permanents you control [that are legendary] gain hexproof and indestructible until end of turn. Partner—Devil Hunter (This can be your second commander if the other is a creature with this ability.)

card.name: Dark Slayer Style
card.text: (Cast this spell only if you control a legendary creature or planeswalker.) Stylish (Your rank starts at D. If it's A or higher, ignore the text in brackets.) Destroy target [nonlegendary] creature. Its controller loses 3 life and you gain 3 life. Partner—Devil Hunter (This can be your second commander if the other is a creature with this ability.)

card.name: Blood Harvest Style
card.text: (Cast this spell only if you control a legendary creature or planeswalker.) Stylish (Your rank starts at D. If it's A or higher, ignore the text in brackets.) [As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature.] Draw two cards and create a Treasure token. Partner—Devil Hunter (This can be your second commander if the other is a creature with this ability.)

card.name: Gunslinger Style
card.text: (Cast this spell only if you control a legendary creature or planeswalker.) Stylish (Your rank starts at D. If it's A or higher, ignore the text in brackets.) Choose up to two targets. Gunslinger Style deals 3 damage to the chosen targets [in total, divided however you choose]. Partner—Devil Hunter (You can have two commanders if the other is a legendary creature with this ability.)

card.name: Swordmaster Style
card.text: (Cast this spell only if you control a legendary creature or planeswalker.) Stylish (Your rank starts at D. If it's A or higher, ignore the text in brackets.) Creatures you control gain [your choice of one of] haste, first strike, and trample until end of turn. Partner—Devil Hunter (You can have two commanders if the other is a legendary creature with this ability.)

card.name: Exceed Style
card.text: (Cast this spell only if you control a legendary creature or planeswalker.) Stylish (Your rank starts at D. If it's A or higher, ignore the text in brackets.) Search your library for a [basic] Forest, Plains, Island, Swamp, or Mountain card, put it onto the battlefield [tapped], then shuffle. Partner—Devil Hunter (You can have two commanders if the other is a legendary creature with this ability.)

card.name: Summoner Style
card.text: (Cast this spell only if you control a legendary creature or planeswalker.) Stylish (Your rank starts at D. If it's A or higher, ignore the text in brackets.) Return up to two target permanent cards [that don't share a card type] from your graveyard to your hand. Partner—Devil Hunter (You can have two commanders if the other is a legendary creature with this ability.)

card.name: Dante, Son of Sparda
card.text: Haste, stylish (Your rank starts at D.) Whenever Dante attacks, choose one. If your rank is A or higher, you may choose one or more. Taunt — Goad target creature. Stinger— Dante gets +1/+0 and gains first strike this turn. High Time — Launch target nonlegendary creature. (Exile it. While it's exiled, its owner may cast it by paying {2} instead of its mana cost.) Partner—Devil Hunter

card.name: Devil Sword Rebellion
You're Just Dead Weight!
card.text: Launch X target nonland permanents you control and X target nonland permanents you don't control. (Exile them. While they're exiled, their owners may cast them by paying {2} instead of their mana costs.)

card.name: Destroyer of Ardor Phantom
card.text: Reach Phantom Baby — When Phantom leaves the battlefield, you may have yourself and target opponent create a number of 1/1 red Demon Spider creature tokens equal to his toughness. Goad them for the rest of the game.

card.name: Lady, Walking Arsenal
card.text: Reach, stylish (Your rank starts at D. If it's A or higher, ignore the text in brackets.) Double Barrels — Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, you may exile a noncreature, nonland card with equal or lesser mana value from your hand. [You may do this only once each turn.] The exiled card becomes plotted. (You may freecast it as a sorcery on a later turn.) Partner—Devil Hunter

card.name: Faust
card.text: Shadowy Cloak — As long as this creature is untapped, it has hexproof. Pierce — {B}: This creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn. Devil Arm — When this creature dies, exile it. As long as it's exiled, you may cast its other face. --- (Back): Devil Arm: Dr. FAUST

card.name: Devil Arm: Dr. FAUST
card.text: Red Shot — Equipped creature gets +1/+1 and has lifelink and "{1}, {T}: This creature deals 1 damage to any target." Set Hat — Whenever equipped creature deals damage, create a tapped Treasure token. Equip {2} --- (Front): Faust

card.name: Nightmare: Alpha
card.text: Consuming Dimension — Whenever Nightmare deals damage to a player, exile target creature that player controls until Nightmare leaves the battlefield. Devil Arm — When Nightmare dies, exile it. While it's exiled, you may cast its other face. --- (Back): Nightmare: Beta

card.name: Nightmare: Beta
card.text: DT Shot — Equipped creature has lifelink, deathtouch, and "Discard a card: This creature gains first strike until end of turn." Equip {2} --- (Front): Nightmare: Alpha

card.name: Red Hot Night
card.text: This spell costs {1} less to cast for each creature on the battlefield. Red Hot Night deals 13 damage to each creature.

card.name: Cavaliere Angelo
card.text: Voltaic — Whenever this creature becomes tapped for the first time each turn, it deals 1 damage to target player and each creature they control. Devil Arm — When this creature dies, exile it. While it's exiled, you may cast its other face. --- (Back): Devil Arm: Cavaliere-R

card.name: Devil Arm: Cavaliere-R
card.text: Trample, haste Equipped creature gets +4/+3 and has trample and haste. Equip {1} Crew 1 --- (Front): Cavaliere Angelo

card.name: Claim the Arcana
card.text: Each opponent faces a villainous choice—You choose a nonland permanent they control and gain control of it, or you look at their hand, choose a nonland card, and freecast it.

card.name: Force Edge
The Despair Embodied
card.text: Flying, menace Damage can't be prevented. If a source you control would deal damage, it deals two times that much damage instead. Whenever this creature enters or attacks, it deals 1 damage to each opponent and each creature they control.

card.name: Lightning Witch Nevan
card.text: Haste, prowess, stylish Get Ready, Sugar! — Whenever Nevan attacks, scry 1. If your rank is A or higher, scry 3 instead. Then reveal the top card of your library. If it's a noncreature, nonland card with mana value equal to or less than her power, you may freecast it. Devil Arm — When Nevan dies, exile her. While she's exiled, you may cast her other face. --- (Back): Devil Arm: Nevan

card.name: Devil Arm: Nevan
card.text: Jam Session — Whenever you cast a noncreature spell from somewhere other than your hand, equipped creature gets +1/+1 and gains prowess until end of turn. (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, it gets +1/+1 until end of turn for each instance of prowess.) Equip {2} --- (Front): Lightning Witch Nevan

card.name: Hysteric Twins
card.text: Create two colorless 3/1 Missile artifact creature tokens with haste, trample, and decayed. (They can't block. When they attack, sacrifice them at end of combat.) Retrace (You may cast this card from your graveyard by discarding a land card in addition to paying its other costs.)

card.name: Arms Workbench
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {1}, {T}: Create a colorless 3/1 Missile artifact creature token with haste, trample, and decayed. (It can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.)

card.name: Grenade Storm
card.text: Grenade Storm deals 2 damage to each opponent and each creature they control. If this spell was cast from exile, it deals 5 damage to each opponent and each creature they control instead. Foretell {4}{R}{R} (During your turn, you may pay {2} and exile this card from your hand face down. Cast it on a later turn for its foretell cost.)

card.name: Explosion Shot
card.text: Explosion Shot deals damage to target player equal to the number of cards in their hand. Exile Explosion Shot suspended with three time counters on it. Suspend 3—{R} (Rather than cast this card from your hand, you may pay {R} and exile it with three time counters on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter. When the last is removed, you may freecast it.)

card.name: Jester's Mockery
card.text: Stylish (Your rank starts at D.) Choose one. If your rank is A or higher, choose one or more instead. • Return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand. • Target creature can't be blocked this turn. • Counter target instant or sorcery spell.

card.name: Plutonian
card.text: Two Heads — This creature has menace and may block up to one additional creature each combat. Underworld Jail — Non-commander cards can't leave your opponents' graveyards.

card.name: Red Empusa
card.text: Bloody Roots — Whenever a land card is put into a graveyard from anywhere, create a tapped Blood token. (It's an artifact with "{1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.") Bloods you control have "{T}, sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color."

card.name: The Savior Has Come
card.text: Choose one or more: • Exile all graveyards. • Destroy all creatures. • Destroy all artifacts. • Destroy all enchantments. Then for each mode you chose, each opponent creates a 2/2 white Knight creature token with vigilance.

card.name: Black Market Connections
card.text: At the beginning of your first main phase, choose one or more — • Pawn a Devil Arm — Create a Treasure token. You lose 1 life. • Pick Up A Lead — Draw a card. You lose 2 life. • Get An Assist — Create a 3/2 colorless Shapeshifter creature token with changeling. You lose 3 life. (The token is every creature type.)

card.name: Mysterious Devil Hunter SSS
card.text: Changeling (This card is every creature type.)

card.name: Fifth Hell: Greed
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, if you lost 5 or more life this turn, create a 2/2 colorless Demon Sand Spirit creature token. {B}, Pay 2 life: Draw a card.

card.name: EX Calibur
card.text: Target creature you control deals damage equal to its power to each other creature and each opponent.

card.name: Raptor News Network
card.text: At the beginning of your postcombat main phase, if you lost 5 or more life this turn, gain 5 life. Otherwise, draw a card and lose 1 life.

card.name: Blood-Goyle
card.text: Flying Awakening Tower — Whenever a land card is put into a graveyard from anywhere, create a tapped Blood token. Overflow — This creature and other Bloods you control have "{1}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Target player mills three cards." {1}, {T}, Discard a card, Sacrifice this creature: Draw a card.

card.name: Morrison, The Broker
card.text: Tokens you control have "{T}: Add {G}." Choose a Background (You can have a Background as a second commander.)

card.name: Damned King
card.text: Whenever you place one or more counters on a creature you control, you may create a colorless 1/1 Soldier artifact creature token and place the same number and kind of counters on it. Do this only once each turn. {2}{W}: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: The Dark Knight Sparda
card.text: [+2]: Gain two ranks. [0]: Look at the top X cards of your library, where X is your number of ranks. Put one into your hand and the rest on the bottom in any order. [-10]: Each opponent chooses half of the permanents they control rounded up. Gain control of them. (Permanently.) Sparda can be your commander. If your commander has Partner—Devil Hunter, you can include Sparda in your deck and mana of any type can be spent to cast him.

card.name: SDT Doppelganger
card.text: Create a token that's a copy of target creature you control, except it isn't legendary. Rebound (If you cast this spell from your hand, exile it as it resolves. At the beginning of your next upkeep, you may freecast it from exile.)

card.name: Nell Goldstein, .45 Virtuoso
card.text: Whenever you cast a historic spell, draw a card. (Artifacts, legendaries, and Sagas are historic.)

card.name: Sealed Atrocity Abigail
card.text: Flying, lifelink Whenever Abigail attacks, defending player discards a card. Whenever a card is put into an opponent's graveyard from anywhere, put a +1/+1 counter on Abigail.

card.name: Tateobesu SSS
card.text: Flying

card.name: Missile SSS
card.text: Haste, trample, decayed (This creature can't block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.)

card.name: Chimera Seed
card.text: {1}, Exile this creature: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. It gains trample until end of turn.

card.name: Sower of Chaos Jester
card.text: When Jester enters, until your next turn, creatures your opponents control attack each combat if able and attack a player other than you if able. Whenever an attacking creature dies, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

card.name: Dispose of the Defect
card.text: Stylish (Your rank starts at D.) Choose one. If your rank is A or higher, choose one or more instead. • Destroy target artifact. • This spell deals 4 damage to target creature. • Create a Treasure token.

card.name: Dante Must Die
card.text: Enchant creature you control When enchanted creature deals combat damage to a player, sacrifice it and attach this Aura to a creature you control. If you do, untap all creatures you control and after this phase, there is an additional combat phase.

card.name: Nero, Devoted Protector
card.text: Whenever Nero enters or attacks, create a Virtuous Role token attached to another target creature you control. (If you control another Role on it, put that one into the graveyard. Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 for each enchantment you control.) Whenever an enchanted creature you control deals combat damage to a player, draw a card.

card.name: Dante, Illicit Handyman
card.text: Deathtouch Take Any Dirty Job — At the beginning of your end step, exile the top card of your library. Until the end of your next turn, you may play that card. Payday — Whenever you play a card from exile, create a Treasure token.

card.name: Virtuous SSS
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 for each enchantment you control.

card.name: Lady, Victorious Engineer
card.text: Affinity for artifacts (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each artifact you control.) When Lady enters, mill four cards. {T}: Choose target artifact card in your graveyard. You may cast that card this turn.

card.name: Damned Bishop
card.text: Flame Circle — You, permanents you control, and spells you control have "Ward—pay 3 life." (Whenever one becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays 3 life.)

card.name: Argosax the Chaos
card.text: Deathtouch At the beginning of your upkeep, sacrifice Argosax unless you sacrifice a land. You may play an additional land on each of your turns. Whenever one or more land cards are put into your graveyard from anywhere, draw a card.

card.name: Holy Fist Beowulf
card.text: Vigilance, first strike Devil Arm — When Beowulf dies, exile him. While he's exiled, you may cast his other face. --- (Back): Devil Arm: Beowulf

card.name: Devil Arm: Beowulf
card.text: Lunar Phase — Equipped creature has double strike and vigilance. Equip {1}{W} --- (Front): Holy Fist Beowulf

card.name: Ice Guardian Cerberus
card.text: Three Heads — Cerberus may block up to 2 additional creatures each combat. Icicle Fall — Whenever a creature blocks or becomes blocked by Cerberus, put a stun counter on that creature. Devil Arm — When Cerberus dies, exile him. While he's exiled, you may cast his other face. --- (Back): Devil Arm: Cerberus

card.name: Devil Arm: Cerberus
card.text: Million Carats — Equipped creature gets +1/+1 and gains "Whenever this creature attacks, put a stun counter on target tapped creature defending player controls." Equip {1} --- (Front): Ice Guardian Cerberus

card.name: Puppeteer of the Temen-ni-Gru
card.text: Whenever a spell you control is countered, exiled, or returned to your hand for the first time each turn, draw a card. {1}{U}: If it's your turn, freecast a noncreature spell from your hand. When you do, exile that spell.

card.name: Welcome to Hell!
card.text: Draw a card and lose 1 life, then repeat this process for each creature (on the battlefield) that was dealt damage this turn.

card.name: Fist of Chaos Balrog
card.text: Haste, menace Ignite The Flame! — Whenever a creature you control deals combat damage to a player, if Balrog is attacking, put a +1/+1 counter on each attacking creature. Devil Arm — When Balrog dies, exile him. While he's exiled, you may cast his other face. --- (Back): Devil Arm: Balrog

card.name: Devil Arm: Balrog
card.text: Welter Move — Whenever equipped creature attacks, put a +1/+1 counter on it, then goad each creature defending player controls with lesser power. (Until your next turn, those creatures attack each combat if able and attack a player other than you if able.) Equip {1} --- (Front): Fist of Chaos Balrog

card.name: Flame Conqueror Berial
card.text: Menace Magma Geyser — Creatures you control get +1/+0 for each player that has lost life this turn and each player that has lost the game. Devil Arm — When Berial dies, exile him. While he's exiled, you may cast his other face. --- (Back): Devil Arm: Lucifer

card.name: Devil Arm: Lucifer
card.text: Ecstasy — Equipped creature gets +1/+1 and has "At the beginning of each end step, this creature deals 3 damage to each opponent and each permanent an opponent controls that was dealt damage by a source you control this turn." Pin-Up — {1}, {T}, Tap equipped creature: Equipped creature deals 1 damage to any target. Equip {2} --- (Front): Flame Conqueror Berial

card.name: Liberating Slash
card.text: This spell costs {3}{B} less to cast if it targets a permanent that was dealt damage this turn. Destroy target creature or planeswalker. Draw a card.

card.name: Chaos's Warm Welcome
card.text: Whenever you cast a spell from anywhere other than your hand, put a chaos counter on this enchantment. At the beginning of your postcombat main phase, add {R} for each chaos counter on this enchantment. You can't use this mana to cast spells from your hand.

card.name: This Party's Getting Crazy!
Copy SSS
card.text: (This token can be used to represent a permanent that's a copy of something else.)

card.name: Arcane Signet
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.

card.name: Command Tower
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.

card.name: Little Guy SSS
card.text: (You should probably stack the triggers so that the Ride Armor ends up attached to Nero instead.)
